whatIsPto.question: What is PTO?
whatIsPto.answer: PTO stands for Paid Time Off: the number of vacation days your employer gives you each year to use however you want. Unlike sick leave or public holidays, PTO days are yours to schedule freely. The challenge is that most people use them randomly and leave a lot of potential rest on the table. Forever PTO helps you place those days strategically around public holidays to turn, say, 5 PTO days into 12 consecutive days off.

whatIs.question: What is this?
whatIs.answer: Forever PTO helps you plan and optimize your paid time off by suggesting the best dates to request based on public holidays and your preferences. Holiday planning can get complicated — Forever PTO simplifies it so you get the most out of every day. You can choose different strategies to spread time off across the year, customize holiday names, and add company-specific or regional holidays.

whyNotSeeingCountry.question: Why am I not seeing my country or holidays correctly?
whyNotSeeingCountry.answer: For simplicity and performance we use a third-party tool to get the bank holidays for a given country and year. It may happen that your country or region is not supported or the data is not up to date. To fix this you can add custom holidays specific to your needs.

pricing.question: Why is there a paid model?
pricing.answer: Forever PTO is free. The paid model covers the cost of data, hosting, and ongoing improvements. It funds updates, support, and infrastructure. Core features remain free so anyone can plan smarter without paying.

restartTutorial.question: How can I see the interactive tutorial again?

algorithms.question: How does the suggestion algorithm work?
algorithms.answer: The system looks at your available workdays, holidays, and preferences (like skipping past dates) to find PTO combinations that maximize your total time off. It scores every possible bridge and block by efficiency, then surfaces the best ones.

strategies.question: What is the difference between "balanced" and "optimized" strategies?
strategies.answer: Balanced aims to spread time off across the year for steady value, while Optimized focuses on maximizing efficiency (effective days per PTO day) by prioritizing the best ratio combinations.

results.question: Why do recommendations change when I update preferences or holidays?
results.answer: Suggestions are recalculated in real time whenever your PTO budget, year, holidays, or strategy changes. Even small tweaks can reshuffle the rankings because the engine re-scores every possible bridge and block.

data.question: How do you handle my data?
data.answer: We store only the minimum information required to generate suggestions. We do not share data with third parties without consent. See the <privacyLink>privacy policy</privacyLink> for full details.

encryption.question: Is my data encrypted?
encryption.answer: Everything is stored locally in your browser — PTO days, selected dates, custom holidays, preferences. We apply light obfuscation so the data isn't readable at a glance, but the real protection is that we never send it to our servers. Your vacation planning never leaves your device.

tracking.question: Do you sell my data or track my vacation plans?
tracking.answer: No. Your planning data stays in your browser and is not sold to advertisers or data brokers. If analytics are enabled, they are limited to product measurement and never used to profile your vacation plans.

code.question: How to contribute code or ideas?
code.answer: <link>Open issues or merge requests</link> with proposals. We need help on algorithms, integrations and UX improvements.

business.question: Propose integrations or corporate partnerships
business.answer: If you represent a company and want to integrate Forever PTO, reach out directly or open a GitHub issue with your proposal.

nonCode.question: Can I collaborate if I'm not a developer?
nonCode.answer: Yes. Feedback on UX, copy, translations, holiday accuracy, testing, and ideas is always useful. If you spot friction or have a specific need, just reach out.

tutorial.description: Set up your plan in 2 steps: your location first, then your days and strategy. Click below for an interactive walkthrough.

steps.toolsDescription: Calculators live here: estimate how many PTO days you've accrued, see what unused days cost you in salary, or count workdays between two dates.
steps.alternativesDescription: Browse the different plans we generated. Compare efficiency and total days off to find your ideal balance. The first option is always our top pick, marked with a sparkle. Use the arrows to explore, then click "Apply alternative" to switch.
steps.statusDescription: Track your PTO at a glance: auto-assigned days, manually selected days, and how many are left. Reset manual changes anytime to go back to the suggested plan.
steps.calendarDescription: This is your year-at-a-glance calendar. Holidays appear in gray, suggested PTO days in teal, and manually selected days in blue. Click any working day to manually toggle selection. The calendar updates instantly as you explore different alternatives.
steps.finishDescription: You're set. Configure your preferences in the sidebar and we'll suggest the best PTO days to take.
steps.holidaysListDescription: Here you can fine-tune the holiday data to match your exact situation. Edit or delete any national or regional holiday, and add your own custom days off: company holidays, local observances, or any date that matters to you. The more accurate the data, the better the suggestions.
steps.step1Description: Select your country, region, and the year you want to plan. This sets up your holiday calendar so we can find the best bridges.
steps.step2Description: Enter how many PTO days you have. This is the base for all calculations.
steps.step3Description: Choose your optimization strategy and configure past days and carryover months to fine-tune your plan.
steps.step4Description: Download your holidays and planned vacation days as a .ics file to import into Google Calendar, Apple Calendar or Outlook, or as a PDF to print or share.
steps.drawerDescription: This bar always shows your current plan summary. Swipe it up (or drag the handle) to explore alternatives and see how your days are distributed.

hero.localeBadge: 🇬🇧 EN · 🇪🇸 ES · 🇮🇹 IT · 🇩🇪 DE · 🇫🇷 FR · 🇺🇸 US
hero.description: Forever PTO calculates exactly which days to request off so your 22 vacation days become 47+ days out of the office. No spreadsheets. No math. No guilt.

marquee.items: easter break · bank holiday weekend · summer stretch · thanksgiving bridge · christmas stretch · november bridge · whit monday bridge · may day long weekend · august bank holiday · new year stretch

how.description: No install. No credit card. No newsletter. Just tell us how many days you have and where you live.
how.inputDaysDescription: How many vacation days you have and which country or region you work in. That's it.
how.engineDescription: It crosses your days with official holidays and regional bridges. Finds all possible combos and ranks them by "rest ratio".
how.exportDescription: Export to Google Calendar, Outlook, or a PDF you paste into the HR form and forget. No more guessing.

features.description: These are the moves Forever PTO makes for you automatically.
features.bridgeTitle: Turn 1 PTO day into 4 days off.
features.bridgeDescription: Detects holidays on Tuesdays and Thursdays and suggests minimal bridges. One strategic day = a 4-day weekend.
features.ratioDescription: Best multiplier: 8 PTO days turned into 28 free days (ES, April '26).
features.syncDescription: Export your plan to the calendar you already use. No hassle.
features.conflictsTitle: Warns you before your boss does.
features.countriesDescription: Official calendars updated every year. Even regional ones.
features.privacyTitle: Your data never leaves your browser.
features.privacyDescription: No login. No account. Your PTO data is stored exclusively in your browser; we never see it.

withoutItems.spreadsheetFrustration: You open a spreadsheet and get stuck on cell C7.
withoutItems.missedBridge: You take the Monday after a holiday without realizing Tuesday was also a holiday.
withoutItems.daysRunOut: You find out in September that you have no days left.
withoutItems.colleagueConflict: A colleague books your week first. Again.
withoutItems.unusedDays: You end the year with 4 unused days.

withItems.planInJanuary: You plan everything in January, while waiting for your coffee.
withItems.dayMultiplier: Each PTO day gives you back 2.1 free days on average.
withItems.visualCalendar: You visualize the whole year in a clear calendar.
withItems.bookFirst: You book first, guilt-free, with data.
withItems.burnAllDays: You burn 100% of your days. As it should be.

martaR.text: I went from taking random days off to having 6 trips planned. My partner thinks I've become organized. I haven't told her it's a website.
martaR.name: Marta R.

diegoA.text: I had 4 years of unused days. This time I used every single one. Came back tanned and almost motivated to work.
diegoA.name: Diego A.

saraV.text: I opened it "just to see" and 90 seconds later had a PDF ready to send HR with the whole year sorted. Ridiculously good.
saraV.name: Sara V.

carlosM.text: I spent 20 minutes arguing with a colleague over who booked the same week first. This app settled it in 3 seconds. I won.
carlosM.name: Carlos M.

lauraT.text: My manager asked how I managed 34 days off with only 22 PTO days. I said "strategy". I did not mention the app.
lauraT.name: Laura T.

thomasK.text: ROI: 22 PTO days in, 47 free days out. That's a 2.1× multiplier. I've shipped worse features at work.
thomasK.name: Thomas K.

closing.description: 22 days can become 47. You just need to know where to place them. That's what we do.

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: This Cookie Policy explains how Forever PTO (<link>https://forever-pto.com</link>) uses cookies and similar technologies. By using our website, you consent to the use of cookies in accordance with this policy.
introduction.p2: We are committed to transparency about how we collect and use data. This policy provides detailed information about the types of cookies we use, their purpose, and how you can control them.

whatAreCookies.title: What are cookies?
whatAreCookies.p1: Cookies are small text files that are placed on your device when you visit a website. They are widely used to make websites work more efficiently and provide information to website owners.
whatAreCookies.p2: Cookies can be 'persistent' cookies or 'session' cookies. Persistent cookies remain on your device for a set period. Session cookies are temporary and are deleted when you close your browser.

strictlyNecessary.title: Strictly necessary cookies (local storage)
strictlyNecessary.description: We use browser local storage to save your preferences and application state. These are essential for the website to function and cannot be disabled:

filters.label: Filters storage:
filters.description: Stores your selected country, region, and year preferences for holiday filtering.

holidays.label: Holidays storage:
holidays.description: Saves your custom holidays and vacation days configuration.

location.label: Location storage:
location.description: Stores your selected location (country and region) for accurate holiday information.

premiumKey.label: Premium key storage:
premiumKey.description: Securely stores your premium access key when you upgrade to Premium.

calendar.label: Calendar state:
calendar.description: Stores your calendar view preferences and selected dates.

duration.label: Duration:
duration.description: These are stored permanently in your browser's local storage until you manually clear them.

cookieBanner.title: Cookie consent banner
cookieBanner.description: When you first visit Forever PTO, you'll see a cookie consent banner. This allows you to choose which types of cookies you want to accept:

strictlyNecessary.label: Strictly necessary:
strictlyNecessary.description: These cannot be disabled as they are essential for the site to work.

analytics.label: Analytics:
analytics.description: Optional cookies that help us understand how visitors use our site.

cookieBanner.consentStorage: Your consent preferences are stored in a cookie called 'cc_cookie' which expires after 6 months.

googleConsent.title: Google Consent Mode v2
googleConsent.description: Forever PTO implements Google Consent Mode v2 to ensure compliance with privacy regulations while maintaining measurement capabilities. This mode allows us to:

default.label: Default consent state:
default.description: Before you make a choice, all non-essential tracking is denied by default.

grant.label: Consent grant:
grant.description: When you accept analytics cookies, we update consent to allow analytics_storage.

denial.label: Consent denial:
denial.description: If you reject analytics, only anonymous, aggregated pings are sent to Google without personal data.

pings.label: Privacy-safe pings:
pings.description: Even without consent, Google may receive anonymous signals that cannot be used to identify you.

googleConsent.categoriesIntro: Consent Mode v2 controls these categories:

categories.analyticsStorage: Controls analytics data collection (we set to 'denied' by default until you consent)
categories.adStorage: Controls advertising cookies (always 'denied' on Forever PTO)
categories.adUserData: Controls sharing user data for advertising (always 'denied')
categories.functionalityStorage: Controls functional cookies (always 'granted' as they're necessary)

googleConsent.gdprCompliance: This implementation ensures full GDPR compliance by respecting your privacy choices while allowing basic anonymous measurements.

dataSecurity.title: Data security
dataSecurity.description: All data stored in local storage:

items.browserSpecific: Is stored only in your browser and never transmitted to our servers
items.notSynced: Is not synchronized across devices or browsers
items.clearingData: Can be deleted by clearing your browser data
items.noAccess: Cannot be accessed by us or any third party

thirdPartyCookies.title: Third-party cookies
thirdPartyCookies.description: When you use certain features of Forever PTO, third-party services may set their own cookies:

payment.label: Stripe (payment processing):
payment.description: When you purchase Premium, Stripe may set cookies for fraud prevention and payment processing. See Stripe's Cookie Policy.

holidayApis.label: Holiday APIs:
holidayApis.description: We use external APIs to fetch holiday data, but these don't set cookies on our site.

analytics.label: Better Stack (analytics):
analytics.description: When you accept analytics cookies, Better Stack may set cookies to track user interactions and measure product usage.

thirdPartyCookies.disclaimer: We are not responsible for third-party cookies and recommend reviewing their respective cookie policies.

managingCookies.title: Managing cookies
managingCookies.description: You have several options to manage cookies and local storage:

browserSettings.title: Browser settings
browserSettings.description: All modern browsers allow you to:

items.view: View cookies and local storage currently set
items.blockSpecific: Block specific cookies from certain sites
items.deleteOnClose: Delete cookies when closing the browser

browserSettings.warning: Note: Blocking or deleting our local storage will reset all your preferences and custom holidays.

browserInstructions.title: Browser-specific instructions
browserInstructions.chrome: Settings > Privacy and security > Cookies and other site data
browserInstructions.firefox: Settings > Privacy & Security > Cookies and Site Data
browserInstructions.edge: Settings > Cookies and site permissions > Manage and delete cookies

inAppManagement.title: In-app management
inAppManagement.description: You can click the cookie icon in the footer at any time to review and modify your cookie preferences.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.description: Under GDPR and other privacy laws, you have the right to:

items.know: Know what data is stored (all data is visible in browser DevTools > Application > Local Storage)
items.access: Access your data (it's all stored locally on your device)
items.delete: Delete your data (clear browser data or use our app's reset option)
items.withdrawConsent: Withdraw consent for analytics cookies at any time
items.object: Object to data processing (though we process minimal data locally)

changes.title: Changes to this policy
changes.p1: We may update this Cookie Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices or for other operational, legal, or regulatory reasons.
changes.p2: We will notify users of any material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of this policy.

contact.title: Contact us
contact.description: If you have questions about this Cookie Policy, please contact us:

introduction.title: Introduction
introduction.p1: Forever PTO is committed to protecting your privacy. This Privacy Policy explains how we collect, use, and protect your personal data when you use our service.
introduction.p2: Forever PTO operates on a privacy-first model. We minimize data collection and process most information locally in your browser.

dataController.title: Data controller
dataController.description: The data controller responsible for your personal data is:

localStorage.title: Local storage data (client-side only)
localStorage.description: The following data is stored exclusively in your browser's local storage and is never transmitted to our servers:

settings.label: Application settings:
settings.description: Your selected country, region, year, PTO days, and filter preferences.

holidayData.label: Holiday data:
holidayData.description: Public holidays fetched from external APIs and cached locally.

customHolidays.label: Custom holidays:
customHolidays.description: Holidays you manually add to the calendar.

calendarState.label: Calendar state:
calendarState.description: Your selected vacation dates and optimization preferences.

premiumKey.label: Premium activation key:
premiumKey.description: If you purchase Premium, your unique activation key is stored locally.

cookieConsent.label: Cookie consent:
cookieConsent.description: Your cookie preferences from the cookie banner.

legalBasis.label: Legal basis:
legalBasis.description: Necessary for providing the service (legitimate interest).

retention.label: Retention:
retention.description: Stored until you clear browser data.

payment.title: Payment information
payment.description: When you purchase Premium, we collect minimal payment-related data:

items.activationKey: Unique activation key generated for your purchase
items.email: Email address (only if you choose to provide it during checkout)

retention.label: Retention:
retention.description: Retained for accounting and legal purposes (7 years as required by Spanish law).

analytics.title: Analytics data (optional)
analytics.description: If you consent to analytics cookies, we may collect:

items.browserInfo: Browser type, device type, screen resolution

legalBasis.label: Legal basis:
legalBasis.description: Consent (which you can withdraw at any time).

retention.label: Retention:
retention.description: Google Analytics retains data for 14 months by default.

contact.title: Contact form data
contact.description: If you contact us via the contact form, we collect your name, email, and message.

legalBasis.label: Legal basis:
legalBasis.description: Legitimate interest in responding to your inquiry.

retention.label: Retention:
retention.description: Retained for the duration necessary to respond, then deleted.

cookiesAndTracking.title: Cookies and tracking technologies
cookiesAndTracking.description: For detailed information about cookies, please see our <link>Cookie Policy</link>.

dataSharing.title: Data sharing
dataSharing.description: We do not sell your personal data. We only share data with trusted third parties as necessary:

paymentProcessors.label: Stripe (payment processing):
paymentProcessors.description: Handles all payment processing securely. See Stripe's Privacy Policy.

holidayProviders.label: Holiday data providers:
holidayProviders.description: We fetch public holiday data from external APIs but do not share your personal information with them.

analytics.label: Google Analytics (if consented):
analytics.description: Processes anonymized usage data. See Google's Privacy Policy.

legal.label: Legal compliance:
legal.description: If required by law or to protect our legal rights.

betterStack.label: Better Stack (analytics, if consented):
betterStack.description: Processes anonymized usage data and tracks user interactions for product improvement. See Better Stack's Privacy Policy.

dataSecurity.title: Data security
dataSecurity.description: We implement appropriate technical and organizational measures to protect your data:

encryption.label: Encryption:
encryption.description: All data transmitted to our servers uses HTTPS/TLS encryption.

localStorage.label: Local storage:
localStorage.description: Most data never leaves your device and is stored locally in your browser.

https.label: Secure infrastructure:
https.description: Our website is hosted on secure, reputable platforms (Cloudflare).

minimalCollection.label: Minimal data collection:
minimalCollection.description: We only collect data that is strictly necessary for the service.

dataSecurity.disclaimer: While we strive to protect your data, no method of transmission over the internet is 100% secure.

yourRights.title: Your rights
yourRights.description: Under GDPR and other data protection laws, you have the following rights:

access.label: Right to access:
access.description: You can request a copy of the personal data we hold about you.

rectification.label: Right to rectification:
rectification.description: You can request corrections to inaccurate or incomplete data.

erasure.label: Right to erasure ('right to be forgotten'):
erasure.description: You can request deletion of your personal data.

restrict.label: Right to restrict processing:
restrict.description: You can request restriction of processing your data under certain conditions.

portability.label: Right to data portability:
portability.description: You can request your data in a structured, machine-readable format.

object.label: Right to object:
object.description: You can object to processing based on legitimate interests or for direct marketing.

withdrawConsent.label: Right to withdraw consent:
withdrawConsent.description: You can withdraw consent for analytics cookies at any time.

complaint.label: Right to lodge a complaint:
complaint.description: You can file a complaint with the Spanish Data Protection Authority (AEPD) or your local supervisory authority.

yourRights.contact: To exercise these rights, contact us at {supportEmail}.

internationalTransfers.title: International data transfers
internationalTransfers.p1: Your data may be transferred to and processed in countries outside the European Economic Area (EEA), particularly the United States (Google Analytics, Stripe).
internationalTransfers.p2: We ensure appropriate safeguards are in place, including Standard Contractual Clauses and adherence to the EU-U.S. Data Privacy Framework where applicable.

childrensPrivacy.title: Children's privacy
childrensPrivacy.p1: Forever PTO is not intended for children under 16 years of age. We do not knowingly collect personal data from children.
childrensPrivacy.p2: If we become aware that we have collected data from a child under 16, we will take steps to delete that information promptly.

changes.title: Changes to this privacy policy
changes.p1: We may update this Privacy Policy from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or service features.
changes.p2: We will notify users of material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of this policy.
changes.p3: Continued use of Forever PTO after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated policy.

dataBreach.title: Data breach notification
dataBreach.description: In the unlikely event of a data breach affecting your personal data, we will notify you and the relevant supervisory authorities within 72 hours as required by GDPR.

contactInfo.title: Contact information
contactInfo.description: If you have questions about this Privacy Policy or wish to exercise your rights, please contact us:
contactInfo.responseTime: We will respond to your inquiries within 30 days.

acceptance.title: Acceptance of terms
acceptance.p1: By accessing or using Forever PTO (the 'Service'), you agree to be bound by these Terms of Service ('Terms'). If you do not agree to these Terms, please do not use the Service.
acceptance.p2: These Terms constitute a legally binding agreement between you and {author}, the operator of Forever PTO.

serviceDescription.title: Service description
serviceDescription.description: Forever PTO is a web-based tool that helps users plan and optimize their paid time off (PTO) by suggesting optimal vacation dates based on public holidays. The Service is available in two versions:

items.optimization: Basic PTO optimization based on public holidays
items.visualization: Calendar visualization of holidays and vacation days

premiumVersion.title: Premium version
premiumVersion.description: The Premium version includes all free features plus:

items.advancedMetrics: Advanced metrics and year summary analysis

eligibility.title: Eligibility
eligibility.p1: By using Forever PTO, you represent and warrant that:
eligibility.p2: We reserve the right to refuse service to anyone for any reason at any time.

items.age: You are at least 18 years of age
items.legalCapacity: You have the legal capacity to enter into binding contracts
items.compliance: Your use of the Service will comply with all applicable laws and regulations
items.lawfulUse: You will use the Service for lawful purposes only

activation.title: Premium activation
activation.description: The Premium version requires a one-time payment processed securely through Stripe. Upon successful payment:

items.multiDevice: Can be activated on multiple devices using your unique key

pricing.title: Pricing
pricing.p1: Pricing for Premium access is displayed at the time of purchase and may vary based on promotions or currency fluctuations.
pricing.p2: All prices are clearly stated before you complete the payment process.

processing.title: Payment processing
processing.description: Payments are processed securely by Stripe, a third-party payment processor. We do not store your full credit card information.

items.other: By making a payment, you agree to Stripe's Terms of Service and Privacy Policy.

processing.p1: Upon successful payment, you will receive a unique activation key.
processing.p2: It is your responsibility to keep this key secure and not share it with others.

keySecurity.title: Activation key security
keySecurity.p1: Your Premium activation key is personal and confidential. Sharing or selling your activation key to others is strictly prohibited and constitutes a breach of these Terms.
keySecurity.p2: If we detect unauthorized use or sharing of activation keys, we reserve the right to deactivate the key without refund.

eligibility.title: Refund eligibility
eligibility.description: We offer refunds under the following circumstances:

items.technical: Technical issues preventing you from using Premium features (provided we cannot resolve the issue within a reasonable time)
items.notAsDescribed: Premium features are not as described
items.accidental: Accidental purchase (must be requested within 24 hours)
items.notSatisfied: You are not satisfied with Premium features (within 14 days of purchase, in accordance with EU consumer protection laws)

exclusions.title: Refund exclusions
exclusions.description: Refunds will NOT be granted in the following cases:

items.timePassed: More than 14 days have passed since the purchase (unless covered by statutory rights)
items.violatedTerms: You have violated these Terms of Service
items.sharedKey: You have shared or sold your activation key

steps.contact: 1. Contact us at {supportEmail} with your transaction ID
steps.include: 2. Include a brief explanation of why you are requesting a refund
steps.review: 3. We will review your request within 5 business days
steps.processing: 4. If approved, the refund will be processed to your original payment method within 10 business days

postRefund.title: Post-refund access
postRefund.description: Upon issuing a refund, your Premium activation key will be deactivated, and you will lose access to Premium features.

euRights.title: EU consumer rights
euRights.p1: If you are a consumer based in the European Union, you have the right to withdraw from the purchase within 14 days without giving any reason, in accordance with Directive 2011/83/EU.
euRights.p2: However, you acknowledge that by activating your Premium key and using Premium features, you waive this right as the digital content has been fully performed.

userResponsibilities.title: User responsibilities
userResponsibilities.description: When using Forever PTO, you agree to:

items.compliance: Comply with all applicable laws and regulations
items.noHarm: Not use the Service in any way that could harm, disable, or impair the Service
items.noUnauthorizedAccess: Not attempt unauthorized access to any part of the Service, servers, or databases
items.noBots: Not use automated systems (bots, scrapers) to access the Service
items.noReverseEngineer: Not reverse engineer, decompile, or disassemble any part of the Service
items.noShare: Not share your Premium activation key with others
items.verifyHolidays: Verify holiday information with official sources before making important decisions
items.noIllegal: Not use the Service for any unlawful purpose

disclaimer.title: Disclaimers and limitations
disclaimer.description: Forever PTO is provided 'as is' without warranties of any kind. We specifically disclaim:

accuracy.label: Accuracy of holiday data:
accuracy.description: While we strive for accuracy, holiday data is sourced from third-party APIs and may contain errors. Always verify with official sources.

availability.label: Service availability:
availability.description: We do not guarantee uninterrupted or error-free operation of the Service.

fitness.label: Fitness for purpose:
fitness.description: We do not guarantee that the Service will meet your specific requirements or expectations.

dataIntegrity.label: Data integrity:
dataIntegrity.description: While we implement security measures, we cannot guarantee absolute security of data stored locally in your browser.

disclaimer.acknowledgement: You acknowledge that the Service is a planning tool and should not be relied upon as the sole basis for employment decisions.

limitationOfLiability.title: Limitation of liability
limitationOfLiability.description: To the fullest extent permitted by law, {author} and Forever PTO shall not be liable for any indirect, incidental, special, consequential, or punitive damages, including but not limited to:

items.profits: Loss of profits, revenue, or business opportunities
items.employment: Employment-related consequences based on incorrect holiday information
items.interruptions: Interruptions or errors in the Service
items.unauthorizedAccess: Unauthorized access to your locally stored data

limitationOfLiability.maxLiability: Our total liability for any claims arising out of or related to these Terms or the Service shall not exceed the amount you paid for Premium access (if applicable) or €50, whichever is greater.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.description: Forever PTO and all its content, features, and functionality (including but not limited to code, design, text, graphics, and logos) are owned by {author} and are protected by international copyright, trademark, and other intellectual property laws.

limitedLicense.title: Limited license
limitedLicense.description: We grant you a limited, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use Forever PTO for personal, non-commercial purposes. This license does not include any resale or commercial use of the Service or its content.

openSource.title: Open source code
openSource.description: Parts of Forever PTO may be available as open-source software under specific licenses. See our <link>GitHub repository</link> for details.

items.copy: Copy, modify, or distribute the Service or its content
items.derivative: Create derivative works based on the Service
items.remove: Remove any copyright or proprietary notices
items.trademarks: Use any trademarks, logos, or service marks without permission

thirdPartyServices.title: Third-party services
thirdPartyServices.description: Forever PTO integrates with third-party services, including:

items.analytics: Google Analytics for usage statistics (if consented)

thirdPartyServices.disclaimer1: We are not responsible for the content, privacy policies, or practices of third-party services.
thirdPartyServices.disclaimer2: Your use of third-party services is subject to their respective terms and conditions.

serviceModifications.title: Modifications to the service

items.modify: Modify, suspend, or discontinue any part of the Service at any time
items.changeFeatures: Change features, pricing, or availability of Premium
items.updatePricing: Update pricing for future Premium purchases (existing Premium users are unaffected)

serviceModifications.notice: We will make reasonable efforts to notify users of material changes.

terminationByUs.title: Termination by us
terminationByUs.description: We may terminate or suspend your access to the Service immediately, without prior notice or liability, if you:

items.requiredByLaw: If required by law or court order

terminationByYou.title: Termination by you
terminationByYou.description: You may stop using the Service at any time. To delete your locally stored data, clear your browser's local storage.

items.rightsCease: Your right to use the Service ceases immediately
items.keyDeactivated: Your Premium activation key (if any) may be deactivated
items.dataRemains: Data stored locally in your browser remains until you delete it
items.provisions: Provisions regarding intellectual property, disclaimers, and limitations of liability survive termination

indemnification.title: Indemnification
indemnification.description: You agree to indemnify, defend, and hold harmless {author} and Forever PTO from any claims, damages, losses, liabilities, and expenses (including legal fees) arising out of:

items.violateRights: Your violation of any rights of another person or entity
items.violateLaws: Your violation of any applicable laws or regulations

law.title: Governing law
law.description: These Terms are governed by and construed in accordance with the laws of Spain, without regard to its conflict of law principles.

jurisdiction.title: Jurisdiction
jurisdiction.description: Any disputes arising out of or related to these Terms or the Service shall be subject to the exclusive jurisdiction of the courts of Barcelona, Spain.

disputeResolution.title: Dispute resolution
disputeResolution.description: Before initiating any legal proceedings, we encourage you to contact us at {supportEmail} to seek an amicable resolution.

euOdr.title: EU online dispute resolution
euOdr.description: If you are a consumer based in the European Union, you may use the <link>EU Online Dispute Resolution platform</link> to resolve disputes.

severability.title: Severability
severability.description: If any provision of these Terms is found to be invalid or unenforceable, the remaining provisions will remain in full force and effect.

entireAgreement.title: Entire agreement
entireAgreement.description: These Terms, together with our Privacy Policy and Cookie Policy, constitute the entire agreement between you and Forever PTO regarding the use of the Service.

waiver.title: Waiver
waiver.description: Our failure to enforce any right or provision of these Terms will not be considered a waiver of those rights.

changes.title: Changes to these terms
changes.p1: We may update these Terms from time to time to reflect changes in our practices, legal requirements, or service features.
changes.p2: We will notify users of material changes by updating the 'Last updated' date at the top of these Terms. Continued use of the Service after changes constitutes acceptance of the updated Terms.

contactInfo.title: Contact information
contactInfo.description: If you have questions about these Terms of Service, please contact us:
contactInfo.responseTime: We will respond to your inquiries within 5 business days.

identification.title: Website owner identification
identification.description: In compliance with Law 34/2002, of July 11, on Information Society Services and Electronic Commerce (LSSI-CE), the following information is provided:

purpose.title: Purpose of the website
purpose.description: Forever PTO (https://forever-pto.com) is a web application designed to help users plan and optimize their paid time off (PTO) by providing holiday information and vacation planning tools.

freeVersion.label: Free version:
freeVersion.description: Basic PTO optimization, calendar visualization, and holiday information.

premiumVersion.label: Premium version:
premiumVersion.description: Advanced analytics, charts, and enhanced planning features available through a one-time payment.

accessConditions.title: Access and use conditions
accessConditions.description: Access to and use of this website is subject to the following conditions:
accessConditions.userAgreement: By accessing this website, you agree to:

items.correctUse: Use the website correctly and lawfully
items.noIllegal: Not use it for illegal purposes or activities that violate these terms
items.noVirus: Not introduce or spread viruses or malicious code
items.noUnauthorized: Not attempt unauthorized access to the website's systems
items.noShareKey: Not share Premium activation keys obtained through payment

liability.title: Liability

items.accuracy: The accuracy or completeness of holiday information obtained from third-party sources
items.decisions: Decisions made by users based on information provided by the website
items.interruptions: Temporary interruptions or technical issues affecting the website
items.misuse: Misuse of the website by users
items.thirdParty: The content or privacy practices of third-party websites linked from Forever PTO

liability.disclaimer: The information provided is for planning purposes only. Users should verify holiday information with official sources before making employment-related decisions.

intellectualProperty.title: Intellectual property
intellectualProperty.p1: All content on this website, including but not limited to text, graphics, logos, code, and design, is the property of {author} and is protected by Spanish and international intellectual property laws.
intellectualProperty.p2: Users are granted a personal, non-exclusive, non-transferable license to use the website for its intended purpose. Reproduction, distribution, modification, or commercial use of the website's content without express permission is prohibited.
intellectualProperty.p3: Some parts of the website may be available as open-source software. For details, please visit our <link>GitHub repository</link>.

thirdPartyLinks.title: Links to third-party websites
thirdPartyLinks.p1: This website may contain links to third-party websites. These links are provided for convenience and informational purposes only.
thirdPartyLinks.p2: {author} does not control or endorse the content of third-party websites and is not responsible for their privacy policies or practices.

modifications.title: Modifications to the legal notice
modifications.p1: {author} reserves the right to modify this Legal Notice at any time to adapt to legislative changes or updates to the website.
modifications.p2: Users are advised to periodically review this Legal Notice to stay informed of any changes.

applicableLaw.title: Applicable law and jurisdiction
applicableLaw.description: This Legal Notice is governed by Spanish law. For any disputes arising from the use of this website, the parties submit to the jurisdiction of the courts of Barcelona, Spain, waiving any other jurisdiction that may apply.

contact.title: Contact
contact.description: For any questions or clarifications regarding this Legal Notice, please contact us at:
